allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const c = readFileSync\('app.js', 'utf-8'\); console.log\(\(c.match\(/\\{/g\)||[]\).length===\(c.match\(/\\}/g\)||[]\).length ? 'JS OK' : 'JS BAD'\);")

Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"query\($s:String\){Media\(search:$s,type:ANIME\){title{romaji native}id}}","variables":{"s":"葬送的芙莉莲"}}' https://graphql.anilist.co -x http://127.0.0.1:7897)

Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"query\($id:Int\){Media\(id:$id\){title{romaji}season year format genres tags{name}relations{edges{node{title{romaji}}relationType}}}}","variables":{"id":1}}' https://graphql.anilist.co -x http://127.0.0.1:7897)

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const c = readFileSync\('app.js', 'utf-8'\); const o=c.match\(/\\{/g\)?.length||0; const cl=c.match\(/\\}/g\)?.length||0; console.log\(o===cl?'Braces OK:'+o:'BAD'\);")
Bash(git -c http.proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7897 -c https.proxy=http://127.0.0.1:7897 push origin master)
